scripts.dev:example: pnpm --filter @threads/contracts build && pnpm --filter @threads/client build && pnpm --parallel --filter @threads/runtime --filter @threads/example-nextjs dev
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @threads/contracts build && pnpm --filter @threads/client build && pnpm --filter @threads/react build && pnpm --recursive lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @threads/contracts build && pnpm --filter @threads/client build && pnpm --filter @threads/react build && pnpm --recursive test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @threads/contracts build && pnpm --filter @threads/client build && pnpm --filter @threads/react build && pnpm --recursive typecheck
